content:
- Continued bug-real-binary-tests-are-optional-via-early-return from TO BE VERIFIED, ran deep skeptical verification sweep over all real-binary skip call sites, and updated plan to include missing coverage (dcs real-etcd tests + both HA real e2e scenarios in test-real) before promoting marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented fail-fast real-binary enforcement end-to-end: removed Option/env-gated skip behavior from src/test_harness/binaries.rs, changed helper signatures to non-optional, and refactored all real-test callers (pg16, etcd3, pginfo, process worker, dcs real fixture, ha e2e resolvers/tests) to fail fast instead of returning Ok(()).
- Updated Makefile and RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md to remove PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES gating semantics, expanded test-real to include real dcs + both HA e2e scenarios, and added AGENTS learning about RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 stabilizing long real e2e gate runs.
- Verification: focused targeted suites all passed; required gates passed with evidence logs under .ralph/evidence/bug-real-binary-tests-are-optional-via-early-return (make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint). make test had one transient unassisted HA flake on the first parallelized run; rerun with RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 passed cleanly.
- Completion: updated task file to done/passing, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, and next immediate step is stage+commit all changed files with required task-finished commit message.
